'''gochanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nibbanic|nibbanic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ch-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nibbanic|nibbanic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gochanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gochanithi|gochanithi]] || [[word:gochaniji|gochaniji]] || [[word:gochanishi|gochanishi]] || [[word:gochaniki|gochaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gochanuthuthu|gochanuthuthu]] || [[word:gochanujuju|gochanujuju]] || [[word:gochanushushu|gochanushushu]] || [[word:gochanukuku|gochanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gochanuthu|gochanuthu]] || [[word:gochanuju|gochanuju]] || [[word:gochanushu|gochanushu]] || [[word:gochanuku|gochanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gochanufthuf|gochanufthuf]] || [[word:gochanufjuf|gochanufjuf]] || [[word:gochanufshuf|gochanufshuf]] || [[word:gochanufkuf|gochanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gochanethe|gochanethe]] || [[word:gochaneje|gochaneje]] || [[word:gochaneshe|gochaneshe]] || [[word:gochaneke|gochaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gochanothotho|gochanothotho]] || [[word:gochanojojo|gochanojojo]] || [[word:gochanoshosho|gochanoshosho]] || [[word:gochanokoko|gochanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gochanotho|gochanotho]] || [[word:gochanojo|gochanojo]] || [[word:gochanosho|gochanosho]] || [[word:gochanoko|gochanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gochanofthof|gochanofthof]] || [[word:gochanofjof|gochanofjof]] || [[word:gochanofshof|gochanofshof]] || [[word:gochanofkof|gochanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gochanïfthïf|gochanïfthïf]] || [[word:gochanïfjïf|gochanïfjïf]] || [[word:gochanïfshïf|gochanïfshïf]] || [[word:gochanïfkïf|gochanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gochanïfthïfthïf|gochanïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:gochanïfjïfjïf|gochanïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:gochanïfshïfshïf|gochanïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:gochanïfkïfkïf|gochanïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gochanïfthïf|gochanïfthïf]] || [[word:gochanïfjïf|gochanïfjïf]] || [[word:gochanïfshïf|gochanïfshïf]] || [[word:gochanïfkïf|gochanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gochanïfthïf|gochanïfthïf]] || [[word:gochanïfjïf|gochanïfjïf]] || [[word:gochanïfshïf|gochanïfshïf]] || [[word:gochanïfkïf|gochanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gochanæthæ|gochanæthæ]] || [[word:gochanæjæ|gochanæjæ]] || [[word:gochanæshæ|gochanæshæ]] || [[word:gochanækæ|gochanækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gochanathatha|gochanathatha]] || [[word:gochanajaja|gochanajaja]] || [[word:gochanashasha|gochanashasha]] || [[word:gochanakaka|gochanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gochanatha|gochanatha]] || [[word:gochanaja|gochanaja]] || [[word:gochanasha|gochanasha]] || [[word:gochanaka|gochanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gochanafthaf|gochanafthaf]] || [[word:gochanafjaf|gochanafjaf]] || [[word:gochanafshaf|gochanafshaf]] || [[word:gochanafkaf|gochanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gochanasha|gochanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gochanshësha|gochanshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochanrosha|gochanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochanmusha|gochanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochanyasha|gochanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogochankshësha|gogochankshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogochankrosha|gogochankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogochankmusha|gogochankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogochankyasha|gogochankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gochachanasha|gochachanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gochachanshësha|gochachanshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochachanrosha|gochachanrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochachanmusha|gochachanmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochachanyasha|gochachanyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogochachankshësha|gogochachankshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogochachankrosha|gogochachankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogochachankmusha|gogochachankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogochachankyasha|gogochachankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gechænasha|gechænasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gechænshësha|gechænshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gechænrosha|gechænrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gechænmusha|gechænmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gechænyasha|gechænyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogechænkshësha|gogechænkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogechænkrosha|gogechænkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogechænkmusha|gogechænkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogechænkyasha|gogechænkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gochfanasha|gochfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gochfanshësha|gochfanshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochfanrosha|gochfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochfanmusha|gochfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochfanyasha|gochfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogochfankshësha|gogochfankshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogochfankrosha|gogochfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogochfankmusha|gogochfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogochfankyasha|gogochfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
